title: CSIR NIIST MTS Vacancy 2026, Notification Out, Apply Online -
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://www.niist.res.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the
jobs_info: CSIR NIIST MTS Vacancy 2026: CSIR – National Institute for Interdisciplinary Science and Technology has issued a notification for the position of Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS). The recruitment drive comprises 02 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 15 June 2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the CSIR NIIST MTS Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.
